data.desc: Monster hordes are approaching. Gear up and prepare for battle!
Refresh the shop to get more equipment.
Identical equipment can be merged to upgrade.
Money bags produce extra silver coins after each wave of enemies.
Upgrade to enhance abilities. Select a talent that you want.
Select one more enhancement that you need.
You've defeated a wave of enemies. Let's take a break.
Refresh the shop to get more equipment.
Attach new grid spaces to expand your backpack.
Attach new grid spaces to expand your backpack.
Use silver coins to refresh the shop and get more equipment.
Make full use of your backpack space and become a master organizer.
